headline: Tilman Fertitta in Talks to Buy Caesars for $7 Billion After Topping Bid From Icahn
summary: Billionaire  Tilman Fertitta  has been in exclusive talks to buy  Caesars Entertainment  for roughly $7 billion after he topped a competing offer from billionaire investor  Carl Icahn’s  firm, according to people familiar with the matter.  Fertitta’s company, Fertitta Entertainment, has been discussing paying around $34 a share for the betting company, the people said.  Caesars shares closed Tuesday at $26.01, giving the company a market value of over $5 billion.
